title: Arlong Shows His Teeth
description: On pages 5–8, arlong shows his teeth focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Sanji as luffy is freed and confronts Arlong directly, shifting the battle toward its final stage.
scene: On pages 5–8, arlong shows his teeth focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Sanji as luffy is freed and confronts Arlong directly, shifting the battle toward its final stage.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Aghhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Whew

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Stretch

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Ha, look at that idiot! He bit that rock pillar!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: his teeth must be BR...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aghhhh! He bit through that pillar!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Ahh, talk about scary!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: If he got bit by that, he wouldn't just get bitemarks...

dialogue.speaker: Chew
dialogue.text: His bones would be chewed right through!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This is the power that we fishman are born with.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: A power that the heavens did not bestow upon your race.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Which is why you are the inferior species!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: We're on completely different levels from the moment of birth!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That's true... that ability's not something a human can achieve even after years of training.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: So what!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Don't get cocky just because of that.

dialogue.speaker: Chew
dialogue.text: ...I don't need to chew through stone,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: To crush it!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hahaaa! Nice one, brother!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That's right! The end result is all the same!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Such Frivo- Louis Object Tions...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: You humans truly are an idiotic, weak, path- etc race!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: What can you do!? You can't even save yourself from drowning!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: It's because I can't do anything,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That I need help!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Shishishishish!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Does he know how to fight with a sword?

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
